title: Zacchaeus — The Man in the Tree

scenes.narration: Zacchaeus was the most disliked man in town. He was a tax collector — and he cheated people out of their money.
scenes.image_prompt: Short pudgy Zacchaeus in fine clothes taking coins from unhappy townspeople, smug expression, colorful bright bible storybook illustration, slightly comedic style

scenes.narration: He was also very short. Which made him easy to ignore. And most people were happy to ignore him.
scenes.image_prompt: Short Zacchaeus being jostled by a crowd, unable to see over people's heads, frustrated expression, colorful cheerful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: One day, Jesus was coming through town. Everyone rushed to see Him. Zacchaeus couldn't see a thing.
scenes.image_prompt: Big crowd lining the streets excitedly, Zacchaeus on tiptoe at the back unable to see, colorful busy cheerful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: So Zacchaeus did something undignified for a grown man. He climbed a sycamore tree.
scenes.image_prompt: Zacchaeus in his fancy clothes awkwardly climbing a big leafy tree, looking ridiculous and determined, crowd below not noticing him, colorful funny bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: He perched up there in the branches... waiting. And then Jesus walked right under his tree.
scenes.image_prompt: Zacchaeus peering down from the tree branches, Jesus walking below with a crowd, Zacchaeus' eyes going wide with surprise, colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Jesus stopped. Looked up. And said — Zacchaeus! Come down. I'm coming to your house today.
scenes.image_prompt: Jesus looking up at Zacchaeus in the tree with a warm smile, pointing at him, crowd gasping in shock, Zacchaeus looking completely stunned, colorful bible illustration

scenes.narration: The crowd was furious. Why would Jesus go to the home of a cheater? But Zacchaeus climbed down as fast as he could.
scenes.image_prompt: Zacchaeus scrambling down the tree as fast as possible with the biggest smile on his face, Jesus waiting below with open arms, crowd looking shocked, colorful joyful illustration

scenes.narration: Something happened at dinner that day. When Jesus sees you — really sees you — it changes things.
scenes.image_prompt: Jesus and Zacchaeus sitting at a table together sharing a meal, warm golden light, joyful conversation, colorful warm bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Zacchaeus stood up and said — I'll give half of everything I own to the poor. And I'll pay back four times what I stole.
scenes.image_prompt: Zacchaeus standing up at the table, hand over his heart, determined and joyful expression, Jesus smiling, colorful bright bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Nobody is too far gone for Jesus to notice. He's not looking for the perfect. He's looking for the willing.
scenes.image_prompt: Zacchaeus handing bags of coins to smiling townspeople, Jesus watching with a warm smile, community celebrating together, bright joyful colorful bible storybook art
